name: ai-self-audit-mcp
description: MCP server for ai self audit. Features self audit, audit conversation, get certificate. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: self_audit
tools.description: AI agent self-audits EU AI Act compliance. Call: 'Am I compliant right now?'

tools.name: audit_conversation
tools.description: Audit conversation for bias, PII, manipulation, transparency issues.

tools.name: get_certificate
tools.description: Generate timestamped compliance certificate for audit trail.

tools.name: regulatory_pulse
tools.description: Current regulatory deadlines and enforcement status.

tools.name: get_audit_trail
tools.description: Return audit trail of all self-audit checks.
